name: Amethyst Cathedral — Calcite Point
description: Tall cathedral geode with saturated grape-purple points and a single white calcite crystal set into the cave. Cut, stable base.

name: Twin-Spire Cathedral
description: Deep-color cathedral with a dramatic druzy interior and a bright calcite point near the center.

name: Grape Cathedral
description: Rich purple cathedral with tightly-packed points and a calcite accent toward the base.

name: Calcite-Centered Cathedral
description: Large statement cathedral, deep violet throughout, with a prominent calcite crystal at its heart.

name: Lilac Cave Geode
description: Open cave geode with soft lilac crystals and a polished black backing — display-ready.

name: Deep Violet Cave Geode
description: Compact cave geode carpeted in deep violet druzy with a calcite cluster at the base.

name: Banded Agate Cathedral
description: Gray-banded agate rim framing a sparkling smoky-to-amethyst cave with a pale druzy lining, on a cut black base.

name: Grape Cave Cathedral
description: Grape-purple cathedral with a deep central cave of well-formed amethyst points, on a cut black base.

name: Slender Spire Cathedral
description: Tall, slender cathedral with a graceful curved profile and soft lilac-to-violet druzy throughout.

name: Statement Lilac Cathedral
description: Large elongated cathedral with lavender druzy and a banded agate edge — a display centerpiece.

name: Pale Lilac Cathedral
description: Tall amethyst cathedral with pale lilac crystals, a banded agate rim, and a cut black base.
